recommendations.title: Ballerina
recommendations.overview: Taking place during the events of John Wick: Chapter 3 – Parabellum, Eve Macarro begins her training in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma.

recommendations.title: Live Free or Die Hard
recommendations.overview: John McClane is back and badder than ever, and this time he calls on the services of a young hacker in his bid to stop a ring of Internet terrorists intent on taking control of America's computer infrastructure.

recommendations.title: Underworld: Evolution
recommendations.overview: As the war between the vampires and the Lycans rages on, Selene, a former member of the Death Dealers (an elite vampire special forces unit that hunts werewolves), and Michael, the werewolf hybrid, work together in an effort to unlock the secrets of

recommendations.title: Total Recall

recommendations.title: Underworld
recommendations.overview: Vampires and werewolves have waged a nocturnal war against each other for centuries. But all bets are off when a female vampire warrior named Selene, who's famous for her strength and werewolf-hunting prowess, becomes smitten with a peace-loving male

recommendations.title: Paradise
recommendations.overview: A man sees the dark side of the time-manipulating biotech company he works for when a crushing debt forces his wife to give up 40 years of her own life.

recommendations.title: Ready Player One
recommendations.overview: When the creator of a popular video game system dies, a virtual contest is created to compete for his fortune.

recommendations.title: Game Therapy
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Adventure, Action, Fantasy, Drama
recommendations.overview: A man tries to cure his friend of his video-game obsession by using a virtual reality machine. When the device traps his friend in a virtual world, he goes in to help him fight for his life.

recommendations.title: Kill Switch
recommendations.overview: A pilot battles to save his family and the planet after an experiment for unlimited energy goes wrong.

recommendations.title: Regular Show: The Movie
recommendations.overview: After a high school lab experiment goes horribly wrong, Mordecai and Rigby must go back in time to battle an evil volleyball coach in order to save the universe — and their friendship.
